task_description: Add an Edit Mode toggle to the mind-map application. When Edit Mode is OFF, the entire card surface becomes a selection/drag target and content editing is disabled. When Edit Mode is ON, existing editing behavior is preserved. This solves the usability issue of accidentally entering edit mode when trying to select cards on a zoomed-out canvas.

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. No test framework exists in this project. The feature implementation is confined to src/App.jsx with all acceptance criteria met.
